@if (loading()) {
Loading vendor profile...
} @else if (error()) {
{{ error() }}
} @else if (detail()) { @let v = vendor()!; @let s = summary()!;
/ Vendors / {{ v.vendorName }}

{{ v.vendorName }}

{{ s.developedAssetsCount }}
Developed Assets
{{ s.managedAssetsCount }}
Managed Assets
{{ v.offerings.length || 0 }}
Service Category
Vendor Name
{{ v.vendorName }}
Website
{{ v.vendorWebsite }}
Type
{{ v.vendorTypeName }}
Status
{{ v.vendorStatusName }}
Category
{{ v.offerings.length || 0 }}
Created By
{{ v.createdBy || '-' }}

Developed Assets

@for (a of developedAssets(); track a.assetId) {
{{ a.assetName }}
{{ assetSubLine(a) }}
{{ a.assetUrl }}
} @empty {
No developed assets.
}

Managed/Hosted Assets

@for (a of managedAssets(); track a.assetId) {
{{ a.assetName }}
{{ assetSubLine(a) }}
{{ a.assetUrl }}
} @empty {
No managed assets.
}
}
